channel.title: How to contribute to open source?
channel.description:
Hey guys!
We have created an initial page of how to contribute, coding or not, to open source and Frontity. We still have to check the copies and content, but I feel it could be good to share our insights. Here you have it: https://docs.frontity.org/contributing/how-to-contribute
I am pretty sure that there are many other ways, so what do you think about sharing your ideas and keep improving our way to contribute to the project?
We have focused at the beginning in these aspects, but any idea is welcomed :wink:
These webs have been inspiring for me if you want to take a look:
- https://opensource.guide/how-to-contribute/ - https://make.wordpress.org/accessibility/handbook/get-involved/

item.title: How to contribute to open source?
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hey Mario! I edited a few things and added how people can contribute with a guest post in our blog

Read full topic
item.source: How to contribute to open source?

item.description:
Looks perfect to me guys

Read full topic

item.title: How to contribute to open source?
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Thanks @SantosGuillamot! Awesome work! I’ll take a look at it later and share any ideas I might have.

Read full topic
item.source: How to contribute to open source?

item.title: How to contribute to open source?
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
@Reyes We have defined some basic ideas about how to help to spread the word about Frontity at the docs, feel free to comment about it, share ideas, and change anything you want

The same for you guys @development-team! You can complete how anyone can contribute to the code, designing the framework or anything else

Read full topic
item.source: How to contribute to open source?

item.title: How to contribute to open source?
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Hey guys!

We have created an initial page of how to contribute, coding or not, to open source and Frontity. We still have to check the copies and content, but I feel it could be good to share our insights. Here you have it: https://docs.frontity.org/contributing/how-to-contribute

I am pretty sure that there are many other ways, so what do you think about sharing your ideas and keep improving our way to contribute to the project?

We have focused at the beginning in these aspects, but any idea is welcomed

These webs have been inspiring for me if you want to take a look:

  • https://opensource.guide/how-to-contribute/
  • https://make.wordpress.org/accessibility/handbook/get-involved/

Read full topic
item.source: How to contribute to open source?
